untranslatable_reason: Signal requires confirmation of price action aligning with fundamental expectations and news-driven validation. These fundamental/news conditions cannot be expressed using only technical indicators from the allowed list. Also requires detection of pullbacks (33-50% retracement) which needs complex multi-bar comparison logic not supported by simple 3-field conditions.
translation_notes: Partially translated using trend confirmation via price crossing SMA_20 on 2+ consecutive periods. Full implementation requires external fundamental data, news event detection, and pullback percentage calculation which are beyond technical indicator scope. The core intent (confirm trend before entry, exit on reversal) is captured in simplified form.
